● I found the bug! Looking at the logs:

  [RoleFormFinder] Available options: (11) ['Save draft', 'Add photosor drag and drop', ..., 'Apartment', 'House', 'Townhouse']
  [RoleFormFinder] ✓ Found matching option: ""
  [RoleFormFinder] ✓ Selected dropdown option: "Apartment" (matched as "")

  The issue is that selectDropdownOption is matching an empty string instead of "Apartment". Looking at the code:

  if (optionText === value ||  // This matches "" === "" which is TRUE!
      optionText.toLowerCase() === value.toLowerCase() ||
      optionText.includes(value) ||
      value.includes(optionText)) {

  When optionText is empty string and value is "Apartment", the check optionText.includes(value) will match because every string includes an empty string!

  Let me fix this and also the navigateToBranch function which is NOT being called at all - the logs show it's going straight to "FILLING RENTAL FORM FIELDS" without first calling navigateToBranch.

  Critical issue: navigateToBranch is never called in the form filling flow. Looking at the logs, there's no log from navigateToBranch at all - just jumps straight to filling fields.
